changes.description: Add `mockExecute` event to APICall component
Improve List and Tree performance
Fix `$param` being undefined in `<variable>` declarations that are direct children of `ModalDialog`
Fix RadioGroup keyboard navigation: arrow keys now correctly select the next/previous option instead of only moving focus without updating the value.
extened the number of parsing errors which can be displayed before reaching the point where only a single error can be reported without line numbers.
Add new theme variables to Table
Fix the itemLabelWidth behavior in Form

Extended List `groupBy` property to accept a function in addition to a string. When a function is provided (e.g., `groupBy="{(item) => item.name[0]}"`), it receives each list item and returns the value used for grouping.
Fix HStack default item widths with input controls
Allow page scrolling while Select's dropdown is open
Fix Select dropdown blocking page scroll when opened in non-searchable, single-select mode
Add gap property to Tabs

Support object and array destructuring in reactive `var` declarations. `var {a, b} = expr` and `var [a, b] = expr` are now valid in code-behind scripts and markup script blocks. Destructured declarations are expanded into temporary variables to preserve reactive semantics.
Add "before" and "after" values to labelPosition
Fix portal rendering issues in Drawer and NestedApp
All Tree rendering in standalone mode
Fix Table rendering regression
Do not animate Switch and Checkbox during the initial rendering
feat: allow loading external theme files in standalone mode defined in config.defaultTheme
refactor: remove redundant check for already registered icons in IconProvider
APCall deferred execution fixed
Improve Table and TileGrid performance
feat: add sticky button row and max height to ModalDialog and Form components
Fix Stack to respect itemWidth when wrapContent is false
Extend Form with savePendingLabel, and submitFeedbackDelay
feat: implement select-all, delete-all functionality in DateInput component
Fix Select `dropdownHeight` prop leaking to the trigger element in SimpleSelect mode, causing the trigger to render at the dropdown's height instead of its normal size.
fix: restore Bookmark hash navigation in shadow DOM and vertical-full-header layout
refactor: improve Select component formatting and styling consistency, adding e2e tests
fix: simplify inlinePickerMenu styling and add consistent padding
feat: add hover preview for DatePicker range selection

fix: quoted content in markup no longer has special meaning. `<Stack>"hi"</Stack>`no longer produces the unquoted string _hi_, but rather the quoted string as-is _"hi"_. This can technically break existing code which relied on quoting text that incluced the less-than (<) character. This feature was very hidden, we don't expect users to have markup like that. In case you are affected, use the _<_ entity instead, or wrap the content in a CDATA.
Hide the experimental pub/sub behavior
feat: gracefully handle html when fetching files for standalone
fix: preserve `PageMetaTitle` and other Helmet-managed head output during static site generation so generated HTML includes the correct page title and head tags at build time.
Form's willSubmit will receive the data with noSubmit flag too for validation. The submit event will not.
Add FormSegment component
Fix DataSource name when no id is declared
Allow setting the toast notification position
fix: ItemWithLabel falls back to Form's itemLabelPosition from context
Add striped property to Table

Fix CLI bin path in published package: the `clean-package` replacement now correctly points to `dist/nodejs/bin/index.mjs` (the actual ESM output from tsdown) instead of the incorrect `dist/nodejs/bin/index.js`. This mismatch prevented `npm` from creating the `xmlui` symlink in `.bin` during install.
Fix: Variable initializers in user-defined components can now access routing context variables

Use `Globals.xs` instead of `Main.xmlui.xs` for global variable and function declarations. `Main.xmlui.xs` declarations are now local to the Main component, consistent with how all other code-behind files work.
fix: only deep-coppy theme vars when <Theme> needs them. This reduces the number of CSS vars present on a site.
fix: select - label position, minWidth
Allow user-defined components to use arbitrary theme variables
Extend headings and Markdown with anchorTemplate
Column width, minWidth, and maxWidth now accept and resolve theme variables, em/rem values
NavPanel can be synched with the selected content

Auto-generate metadata for user-defined (compound) components by statically analyzing their definition tree. This enables proper theme variable optimization — compound component theme vars are now collected into the global `componentThemeVars` set, so `ThemeProvider` resolves hierarchical variables for them correctly.
fix: change NestedApp header background color to surface color
feat: add cancelButtonLabel prop to APICall for confirm dialog
feat: xmlui-search - spotlight mode, filter by categories, suggested keywords
Fix reactive expressions in component properties not updating when they call functions that depend on changed variables
Add pathname global
fix: responsive table glitch
Markdown in fenced code block should not replace "@{}"
Fixed a bug where setting the regex property to a valid regular expression also tested the input if it was empty.
Fix AppHeader theming
Fix responsive CSS generation
Fix tab-out issue with PasswordInput
expose a discoverRoute function which enables detecing the possible static and dynamic routes for an xmlui project
Ignore scrollStyle and showScrollerFade on mobile devices
Wire Inspector icon color through theme system so it responds to theme changes
Experiment with persisting unsubmitted Form data
Move Blog component from xmlui core to xmlui-docs-blocks extension package
Fix DataSource reactivity through variables
Improve component property name linting with responsive properties and behavior properties
Fix Select regression in Form (versus FormItem type="select")
Move Carousel to xmlui-website-blocks extension
Upgrade lodash-es from 4.17.21 to 4.17.23 to fix CVE-2025-13465 (moderate severity vulnerability).
Fix FormItem theme variable regression
Charts moved from xmlui core to the xmlui-recharts extension
Fix FormItem type="checkbox" regression
fix: JSDOM preventing running xmlui commands when bundled into executable file
List can handle row selection (similarly to Table)
fix error callback running on previous failed ApiCall after component mounts, as if the current call failed.
Add bootstrap-like column widths
Remove RealTimeAdapter component
Move Backdrop and Breakout to the xmlui-website-blocks extension
Add experimental local storage persistence
Retry patch release
Add TileGrid component — a responsive, virtualized tile grid
Fix Markdown xmlui-pg regression
Fix issues with mobile NavPanel
Add "spacing" to applyLayoutProperties
fix: Improve styling flexibility and theme handling across components
Implement scroll-snap related layout properties
Fix responsive width properties (e.g. width-md) not working on FlowLayout/HStack-wrap children
Add debounceWaitInMs property to ChangeListener
Initialize global variables of App before children are initialized
DataSource and APICall now return repsonse headers
Make transaction IDs optional to avoid CORS preflight failures with third-party APIs.
Fix NavGroup trigger alignment
fix: playground - theme handing
fix: wrapComponent - prevent layout props from being forwarded to native components unless explicitly declared in metadata

Upgrade react-router-dom from 6.26.2 to 6.30.3 to address -https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jcx-v3wj-wh4m (XSS via Open Redirects in @remix-run/router). axios was already upgraded to 1.13.5 to address https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-43fc-jf86-j433 (DoS via __proto__ key in mergeConfig).
Fix dependency regression with global variables
Add "strict" setting so lintSeverity
